event: Drapery Study for the Virgin in Madonna and Child with St. Anne
description: A charcoal or black chalk drawing showing a study of draped fabric over a seated figure, rendered without a visible head. The figure appears to be leaning or reaching forward, with complex folds and cascades of heavy cloth creating strong patterns of light and shadow. The drapery is meticulously observed, with deep shadows in the folds and bright highlights on the ridges. The drawing focuses entirely on the fall and weight of the fabric over the underlying form. The paper is aged and the corners slightly trimmed.

_meta.title: Study for Madonna and Child with St. Anne
